Thanks for contributing to OpenSyncCRDT! Please fill out the sections below.

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A concise description of the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123. Open PRs should reference an issue where possible. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (go vet + staticcheck)
- [ ] `make test-race` passes
- [ ] Integration tests pass where relevant (`make test-integration`)
- [ ] New behaviour is configurable via env var / config file — no code changes required to toggle it
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated documentation (`docs/`, README) where relevant
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] The change is within scope (sync infrastructure only — see CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
